overview: SolVault is the go-to Solana NFT app on ICP — connect your Phantom wallet to hold, mint, and sell SOL NFTs. Browse your portfolio, create collections, mint new NFTs, and trade on the built-in marketplace with fixed-price listings and timed auctions.
features: Phantom wallet authentication with automatic admin detection
NFT portfolio viewer with SOL balance and collection stats
Admin dashboard for curating official NFT collections
User NFT collection creation with SOL fee payment
NFT minting with image upload and Metaplex metadata
Fixed-price marketplace listings with secure NFT escrow
Timed auction system with real-time bidding and countdown
Solana Devnet integration via HTTP outcalls
